title: nasturtium aucheri
intro: Nasturtium aucheri is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as a type of nasturtium. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nasturtium aucheri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Nasturtium aucheri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams for topical applications.
